analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes ISC DHCP server logs, focusing on timestamp normalization. It's designed to standardize DHCP server events for network activity monitoring and IP address assignment tracking.
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: isc_dhcp-latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:22:06.847286

-- Pre-declare locals for performance optimization
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local string_format = string.format

-- Constants
local CLASS_UID = 1001
local CATEGORY_UID = 1
local TYPE_UID = 100101

-- ISO8601 timestamp pattern for validation
local ISO8601_PATTERN = "^%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%dT%d%d:%d%d:%d%d"

-- Utility functions
local function validate_timestamp(ts)
    if not ts then return nil end
    if type(ts) == "number" then return ts end
    if type(ts) ~= "string" then return nil end
    
    -- Basic ISO8601 validation
    if not string_match(ts, ISO8601_PATTERN) then
        return nil
    end
    
    -- Convert to epoch seconds
    local year, month, day, hour, min, sec = 
        string_match(ts, "(%d+)-(%d+)-(%d+)T(%d+):(%d+):(%d+)")
    
    if not year then return nil end
    
    return os.time({
        year = tonumber(year),
        month = tonumber(month),
        day = tonumber(day),
        hour = tonumber(hour),
        min = tonumber(min),
        sec = tonumber(sec)
    })
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with detailed error message
    if not record then
        return nil, "Record is nil"
    end
    if type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, string_format("Expected table, got %s", type(record))
    end
    if not record.unmapped then
        return nil, "Missing unmapped data structure"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local reference
    local output = {
        -- Required OCSF fields
        class_uid = CLASS_UID,
        class_name = "Network Activity",
        category_uid = CATEGORY_UID,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        type_uid = TYPE_UID,
        
        -- Metadata
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "DHCP Server",
                vendor_name = "ISC"
            },
            version = "1.0.0"
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp processing with validation
    local timestamp = record.unmapped.timestamp
    if timestamp then
        local validated_time = validate_timestamp(timestamp)
        if validated_time then
            output.time = validated_time
        else
            -- Fall back to current time if invalid
            output.time = os_time()
            output.observo_metadata = {
                timestamp_validation_failed = true
            }
        end
    else
        output.time = os_time()
    end

    -- DHCP-specific field processing (extensible)
    if record.unmapped.ip_address then
        output.src_endpoint = {
            ip = record.unmapped.ip_address
        }
    end

    if record.unmapped.mac_address then
        output.src_endpoint = output.src_endpoint or {}
        output.src_endpoint.mac = string.lower(record.unmapped.mac_address)
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.time then
        return nil, "Failed to process timestamp"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper for production use
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

Alert on sustained high error rates
